title: Read the repository files Bookforge/plans/popebot_execution.md, Bookforge/plans/roadmap/99_execution_order.md, and Bookforge/plans/tasks/phase_0.yaml from the
job:
Read the repository files Bookforge/plans/popebot_execution.md, Bookforge/plans/roadmap/99_execution_order.md, and Bookforge/plans/tasks/phase_0.yaml from the checked-out repo inside the container. Follow these steps:

1. Verify all three files exist at the exact paths. If any are missing, fail immediately.
2. Parse phase_0.yaml to find the first task with status "todo":
   - Report exact task ID
   - Report exact task title
   - Report exact output_files array
   - Report exact validation_steps array
3. Implement ONLY that single task:
   - Create files/directories ONLY under Bookforge/
   - Do NOT create alternate paths like Bookforge/tasks/
   - Do NOT invent files or paths
4. Run all listed validation_steps
5. Commit changes
6. Open PR to main

If any files are missing during execution, stop and report the failure instead of guessing.
